title: polygala juncea
intro: Polygala juncea, also known as commonly known as yin chiao or Chinese fleece flower, is a perennial plant native to China and parts of Southeast Asia, characterized by its delicate white or purple flowers and hairy leaves. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant is said to possess health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress and anxiety. Polygala juncea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
